headline: Can Hormel Foods' International & Foodservice Offset Retail Weakness?
summary: HRL balances Retail weakness with gains in Foodservice and International, reflecting uneven segment performance.

headline: Atmosphere TV Wins Attention for CTV OOH Advertisers
summary: MediaScience Study Finds Atmosphere Delivers Audiences and Optimal Ad Performance Compared to Linear TVNEW YORK and AUSTIN, Texas, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Atmosphere TV, the leading streaming CTV out-of-home (OOH) platform, has partnered with media and advertising innovation research firm MediaScience to prove Atmosphere captures more attention compared to linear and CTV in OOH environments. headline: Mondelez's Chocolate Sales Show Strength in FY25: Is It Sustainable?
summary: MDLZ's chocolate sales rise 11.4% in 2025 as pricing offsets cocoa cost pressure, but volume declines raise questions about how durable that growth is.
